title: aillya umbellata var. spathulata
intro: Aillya umbellata var. spathulata, also known as the broad-leaved Indian aillya, is a plant species that belongs to the family Apiaceae. This plant has been traditionally used for its medicinal properties, particularly for its anti-inflammatory and antioxidant effects. The broad-leaved Indian aillya has been found to have various health benefits, including reducing fever, relieving respiratory issues, and providing relief from digestive problems. It can be prepared into herbal teas, infusions, or decoctions for consumption, and is also used in traditional Ayurvedic medicine to treat various ailments.
